articles.title: SIKON, SONY, AND CANON FIGHT AI FAKES WITH NEW CAMERA TECH
articles.summary: Nikon, Sony Group, and Canon are developing camera technology to embed digital signatures in images, allowing differentiation from AI-generated fakes. Nikon's mirrorless cameras will include tamper-resistant digital signatures for professionals, providing details like date, time, and location. Sony plans to add an online tool called Verify to its mirrorless SLR cameras in spring 2024 to check images for digital signatures, highlighting any AI or tampered content. Canon will introduce similar technology for images and videos by 2024. These advancements address the growing challenge of distinguishing real images from sophisticated AI-generated fakes.

articles.title: INTEL TO SPIN OUT AI SOFTWARE FIRM WITH OUTSIDE INVESTMENT
articles.summary: Intel is forming a new independent company called Articul8 AI focused on artificial intelligence software, with investment from DigitalBridge Group and other investors. Articul8, stemming from Intel's work with Boston Consulting Group, will have an independent board and will not be publicly traded, will focus on creating cost-effective, secure AI solutions for business use.

articles.title: SELF-PLAY FINE-TUNING CONVERTS WEAK LANGUAGE MODELS TO STRONG LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: One of the big drawbacks of current language models is that you need extremely expensive human preference data to make them work well. A big research direction recently has been figuring out if we can have the language models perform self-play to improve without collecting this data. SPIN is a new method that takes a step in that direction with just SFT data - it can dramatically improve a base model’s performance across various tasks.

articles.title: LEARNING TO FIND BOUNDARIES WITH BOUNDARY ATTENTION
articles.summary: Finding contours and boundaries in images is a classic computer vision problem. However, when introducing noise, quality shifts, or out-of-distribution examples, many existing methods fail to perform well. This new learned method performs extremely well on sensor readings and is only 207k parameters. It uses a two-stage training process and greatly improves state of the art.

articles.title: ENHANCING LOW-LIGHT PHOTOS WITH SELF-SUPERVISED ADAPTATION
articles.summary: This research leverages bracketing photography and a novel temporally modulated recurrent network (TMRNet) to significantly improve photo quality in low-light conditions. By training with synthetic data and adapting to real-world images, this approach outperforms existing multi-image processing methods.

articles.title: GPT-FAST MIXTRAL SUPPORT
articles.summary: GPT-fast is a great push from the Pytorch team to speed up vanilla models. It can achieve an impressive 218 tokens per second across 8 GPUs.

articles.title: TINYGPT-V
articles.summary: Efficient multimodal large language model with a small backbone.

articles.title: GENERATING VR SIDE-BY-SIDE VIDEOS WITH MARIGOLD
articles.summary: By using state-of-the-art depth estimation and some classical video processing, you can now turn monocular videos into 3D viewable XR experiences! The code is MIT-licensed and available for commercial use.

articles.title: TEXT-TO-AUDIO GENERATION WITH T2I MODEL ADAPTATION
articles.summary: The Auffusion system, inspired by Text-to-Image diffusion models, offers a breakthrough in Text-to-Audio (TTA) generation. It excels in creating high-quality audio from text, especially for complex inputs.

articles.title: THE NYT VS OPENAI IS NOT JUST A LEGAL BATTLE
articles.summary: The New York Times' lawsuit against OpenAI highlights a deep-seated conflict between the advancement of technology and copyright infringement. While some argue for unrestricted AI progress as a boon to humanity, others stress the moral imperative to respect creators' rights and advocate for a balanced approach that values both technological advancement and the protection of intellectual property. This dispute underscores the complex relationship between morality and progress in the AI era.

articles.title: WHAT WE LEARNED ABOUT AI AND EDUCATION IN 2023
articles.summary: Education is adapting to the integration of AI by exploring collaborative approaches to AI-assisted tutoring, writing instruction, and assessment.

articles.title: VELLUM: AI BEYOND JUST AN API
articles.summary: Choose the right prompts and models, integrate them with agents using RAG and APIs, then deploy and continuously improve in production.

articles.title: COLBERT USAGE EXAMPLES (COLAB NOTEBOOK)
articles.summary: ColBERT is a state-of-the-art method for retrieval and generation. Its authors have provided a notebook to help people get up to speed and try the method out.

articles.title: CHATGPT UNWRAPPED (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Create a year in review for your ChatGPT usage.

articles.title: EFFICIENT LLM INFERENCE ON CPUS
articles.summary: Intel has released an optimized toolkit for inferencing Transformers on the CPU.
